license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.krbcv2n
title: Agarose Gel Separation of Reovirus Particles by sigma1 Content
author: Bernardo Mainou

steps_raw.instruction: Combine 0.4 g of agarose with 40 ml of TAE
Microwave until agarose is thoroughly melted
Add water to replace water lost during boiling up to 40 ml and mix well
Pour 35 ml agarose to clean casting rig (7x10 cm)
Mix purified reovirus and loading dye 1:1 at 1x1011 particles per well (25 ul max)
Stain gel with colloidal blue as directed
Image gel by on Licor Odyssey Imaging System
